title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Ashok Leyland

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Ashok Leyland
jsonLd.description:
Ashok Leyland invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ashok Leyland:
Ashok Leyland is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ashok Leyland!
